summary: OpenAI announces the OpenAI Partner Network to help organizations adopt AI solutions
GLM 5.2 is a fully open-source frontier model with 744B parameters
Databricks introduces Omnigent, a meta-harness for combining and controlling AI agents
Rio 3.5 Open is an open-weights LLM that beats Qwen 3.7 Plus on Terminal 2.1
Zyphra releases Zamba2-VL, a family of open vision-language models that cut time-to-first-token by about an order of magnitude.
NodeFox introduces a browser-based runtime for building local AI workflows as executable graphs
Browserless Agent is a fast MCP browser agent for AI clients
The Sandbox launches an AI game engine for creating live multiplayer games
WhatsApp Workflows is a visual builder for chatbots and AI agents
Moonshot AI launches Kimi Work, a local desktop agent for knowledge workers
Atropos Health launches Evidence Agent MCP on Databricks for real-world evidence
Google introduces OpenRL, a self-hosted post-training API for fine-tuning LLMs
Eidentic introduces an open-source TypeScript SDK for building AI agents
Backblaze introduces Genblaze, an open-source Python SDK for generative media pipelines
Cresta Conductor is a developer-first agentic engine for building AI agents
Sensi.AI launches a unified agentic operating system for home care
GitHub introduces Agentic Workflows, a tool for automating reasoning-based tasks
Anthropic launches Claude Fable 5, a state-of-the-art model for general use with exceptional performance in various areas.
Google introduces DiffusionGemma, an experimental open model for fast text generation, delivering up to 4x faster inference on dedicated GPUs.
Resemble.ai releases Chatterbox Multilingual v3, a TTS model with embedded watermarking for 21 languages and 4 dialects.
Bria launches V-RMBG 3.0, a state-of-the-art video background removal model with improved temporal consistency and smarter foreground detection.
Fused Triton kernels released for MaxSim late interaction scoring
LocalAI releases version 4.4.0 with new audio backends and features
Stack Overflow launches a platform for AI agents and developers
GitLab announces new capabilities for enterprises to give speed and control at agentic scale
Cohere releases North Mini Code, a 30B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model for agentic software engineering tasks, available on Hugging Face.
Zilliz introduces Loon, a new storage engine for vector data
pi-taskflow releases version 0.0.16 with new features and improvements
Researchers release Harness-1, a 20-billion parameter open-source search agent outperforming GPT-5.4
Apple introduces Siri AI, a more capable and personal assistant powered by Apple Intelligence
TokenMix introduces BGE Embeddings 2026, a 569M-parameter model supporting dense, sparse, and multi-vector retrieval, and over 100 working languages.
Google Research introduces TurboQuant, a vector-quantization method for compressing KV caches and embeddings, reducing memory by 6x.
MiniMax M3 is an open-weight model with 1M context and sparse attention
Google releases Gemma 4 with quantization-aware training, optimizing model compression for mobile and laptop efficiency.
NVIDIA releases Nemotron 3 Ultra, a 550B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model for orchestrating complex, long-running agent workflows.
Jina introduces Jina Embeddings v5 Omni, a multimodal embedding approach extending Jina Embeddings v5 Text to encode text, image, audio, and video.
Google releases Gemma 4 12B, a dense multimodal model with a unified architecture
Nex-N2 is an agentic model with Agentic Thinking for real-world productivity scenarios
Meta introduces Business Agent, an AI-powered tool for businesses to deliver personalized experiences
Microsoft introduces MAI-Thinking-1, a medium-sized reasoning model that matches leading models on key software engineering benchmarks.
Microsoft introduces MAI-Transcribe-1.5, a multilingual speech-to-text model with best-in-class Word-Error-Rate across 43 languages.

topic: Integrated Embeddings in Azure Cosmos DB
summary: Microsoft announces the public preview of Integrated Embeddings in Azure Cosmos DB, automatically generating and maintaining embeddings for AI applications.
Microsoft introduces OmniVec, an open-source embedding platform for building and operating embedding pipelines on Azure.
Microsoft AI launches seven new MAI models, including MAI-Thinking-1, for various tasks
Microsoft AI introduces MAI-Code-1-Flash, a new coding model for fast and efficient assistance
Chalk introduces Chalk Compute, a time-traveling agent sandbox for cloud environments
NVIDIA introduces Cosmos 3, a world foundation model for physical AI systems
